ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-29-2006 IN 206, NPLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 12/18/06 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206; SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR 12/8/06 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 304. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS STIPULED TO. PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE ALL PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AND CAUSATION WITNESSES AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 9/29/06, AND SHALL ALSO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS THEY INTEND TO USE AT TRIAL AS TO PRODUCT IDENTIFICATION AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY THAT DATE. IF PLAINTIFF LEARNS OF NEW WITNESSES, IN GOOD FAITH, THEY SHALL IMMEDIATELY BE DISCLOSED ALONG WITH DECLARATION AS TO WHY THIS DISCLOSURE WAS NOT PROVIDED ON THE DUE DATE. ALL ECONOMIC EXPERT DISCOVERY IS TO BE COMPLETED 14 CALENDAR DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, INCLUDING DEPOSITION OF ECONOMIC EXPERT. THE PARED-DOWN LIST OF EXPERTS WILL BE FAXED NO LATER THAN 14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL DATE. NO LATER THAN 12 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE, EACH SIDE MAY IDENTIFY UP TO THREE EXPERT WITNESSES PERCEIVED TO BE NECESSARY TO BE DEPOSED FOR MEANINGFUL SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS TO OCCUR. THESE EXPERTS WILL BE DEPOSED PRIOR TO THE TRIAL DATE. TRIAL WILL NOT BE DELAYED FOR THE PURPOSE OF DEPOSING EXPERTS. OUTSTANDING AUTHORIZATIONS TO BE PROVIDED BY 9/15/06. VERIFICATION OF INTERROGATORIES SET NO. 1 TO BE PROVIDED BY 9/8/06. PLAINTIFF TO DISCLOSE BANKRUPT ENTITIES BY 9/22/06. DEPOSITIONS TO BE COMPLETED BY 9/22/06. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE ROBERT L.
